subject: Social Sciences
title: Ancient Civilizations
tagline: Journey to Egypt and Mesopotamia — discover the first great civilizations!

stages.name: Stage 1
stages.question: Which river was central to Ancient Egyptian civilisation?
options: That the dead lived on in another world
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! The Nile is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is The Nile.

stages.name: Stage 2
stages.question: What structures did the Ancient Egyptians build as tombs?
options: That the dead lived on in another world
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Pyramids.

stages.name: Stage 3
stages.question: What writing system did Ancient Egyptians use?
options: That the dead lived on in another world
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Hieroglyphics.

stages.name: Stage 4
stages.question: Which ancient civilisation built the Great Wall?
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Ancient China is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Ancient China.

stages.name: Stage 5
stages.question: What was Ancient Rome's system of government called?
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! A republic is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is A republic.

stages.name: Stage 6
stages.question: Which ancient civilisation is known for the Parthenon?
options: That the dead lived on in another world
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Ancient Greece is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Ancient Greece.

stages.name: Stage 7
stages.question: What did Ancient Mesopotamia develop that helped record history?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Writing (cuneiform).

stages.name: Stage 8
stages.question: What was Great Zimbabwe known for building?
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Stone structures and walls is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Stone structures and walls.

stages.name: Stage 9
stages.question: What did Ancient Egyptians believe about the afterlife?
options: That the dead lived on in another world
stages.correctOption: That the dead lived on in another world
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! That the dead lived on in another world is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is That the dead lived on in another world.

stages.name: Stage 10
stages.question: Which ancient African kingdom traded gold along the Indian Ocean?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Mapungubwe.
